lines.speaker: Kjut
lines.text: Kebabs! Get your kebabs here! One gold each!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sure, one kebab please.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sure, one kebab please.

lines.speaker: Kjut
lines.text: Yes? Are you going to give me that one gold coin then?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, I don't seem to have any money on me.

lines.speaker: Kjut
lines.text: The bank is Keldagrim-West. Hurry back!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm looking for a drunken dwarf.

lines.speaker: Kjut
lines.text: Just go out in the streets, they can't be hard to find!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, a specific drunken dwarf, he keeps harassing me.

lines.speaker: Kjut
lines.text: That's still not very helpful. But let me see. There is one particularly drunken dwarf just to the northeast of here.

lines.speaker: Kjut
lines.text: He's scaring away my customers, he says there's something wrong with my kebabs. Quite annoying fellow.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't think that's who I mean.

lines.speaker: Kjut
lines.text: Well, he does have a relative who wanders all over Gielinor. Comes back from time to time to buy more kebabs. Don't see him very often though.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you think I'll have any chance of catching him here?

lines.speaker: Kjut
lines.text: I think he was back here quite recently, so I doubt he'll be back any time soon.

lines.speaker: Kjut
lines.text: I thought you would know plenty!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do you mean?

lines.speaker: Kjut
lines.text: Oh come on! You in the Laughing Miner? The whole city knows about you and your dwarven drinking buddies!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Right, right.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you have any quests?

lines.speaker: Kjut
lines.text: Not really! I have a steady supply of meat coming in through the carts and I don't really need anything else!
